items.name: SaaS Dashboard
items.description: Data-driven SaaS dashboard with KPI overview, team management, deep analytics, billing, and a public marketing landing page. Multi-archetype composition with full auth and settings.

items.name: Spatial Collaboration
items.description: Immersive collaborative workspace combining spatial depth-layered canvases with real-time presence, auth, and public-facing about pages.

items.name: Terminal Dashboard
items.description: CLI-style terminal dashboard for developer tools. Retro-modern terminal aesthetic with phosphor green/amber, ASCII borders, split panes, and optional CRT effects. Dark mode only.

items.name: Workbench
items.description: Technical design-system workbench with multi-panel IDE workspace, component catalog browser, property inspector with live preview, and full auth and settings. Multi-archetype composition for design system power users.

items.name: Restaurant Ops
items.description: Warm restaurant operations hub with floor maps, kitchen display system, menu engineering, inventory, server stations, customer loyalty, daily operations, and full auth with marketing landing.

items.name: Two-Sided Marketplace
items.description: Clean, trustworthy marketplace serving both buyers and sellers. Listing browser, buyer and seller dashboards, messaging, reviews, and full auth with marketing landing.

items.name: Real-Time Collaboration Workspace
items.description: Complete collaboration platform with live presence, remote cursors, inline comments, and hierarchical pages. Notion/Linear-style productivity workspace with warm, content-focused design.

items.name: Registry Platform
items.description: Content registry with browsing, publishing, user management, team collaboration, and admin moderation. Dogfooded UI for the Decantr design intelligence platform.

items.name: Event & Community Hub
items.description: High-energy community hub with event discovery, social feed, ticket checkout, organizer tools, and vibrant marketing landing. Built for connection and celebration.

items.name: Knowledge Base
items.description: Warm, reading-optimized documentation platform with AI-powered search, changelog, interactive API reference, and community-friendly knowledge sharing.

items.name: Research Lab
items.description: Scientific research workspace with lab notebooks, experiment tracking, sample inventory, instrument booking, dataset repository, and full auth with marketing landing.

items.name: Product Landing Page
items.description: Bold, high-impact product landing page composition with split hero, feature showcase, pricing, testimonials, resources blog, and legal pages. Multi-archetype composition designed to convert visitors into users.

items.name: Portfolio
items.description: Bold, expressive portfolio with project showcase, about/skills pages, and a personal blog. Multi-archetype composition with full-bleed project views, bio and contact pages, and comfortable reading typography.

items.name: Legal Research
items.description: Authoritative legal research workspace with case law search, contract diffs, matter management, citation tools, and full auth with marketing landing.

items.name: Recipe Community
items.description: Warm, appetite-driven recipe community with browsing, cook mode, recipe creation, social features, and a marketing landing page. Multi-archetype composition with full auth and settings.

items.name: Multi-Tenant Platform
items.description: Enterprise-grade multi-tenant platform console with organization switching, API management, usage billing, webhooks, and audit logging. Built for trust and scale.

items.name: E-Commerce
items.description: Full-featured online retail experience with product browsing, checkout, order tracking, marketing landing, and complete auth and settings.

items.name: Observability Platform
items.description: Data-dense monitoring command center with metrics dashboards, log exploration, distributed tracing, alert management, and full auth. Built for SREs and platform engineers.

items.name: Property Management Portal
items.description: Complete property management platform for real estate investors and property owners. Includes portfolio dashboard, property/unit management, tenant management, financial tracking (P&L, rent roll, expenses), maintenance ticketing, and a self-service tenant portal.

items.name: Esports HQ
items.description: Professional esports team operations with roster tracking, scrim scheduling, VOD review, sponsor dashboards, and full auth with marketing landing.
